name: Broiled Butterflied Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Olive oil or cooking oil
1 pinch of thyme, tarragon, or mixed herbs (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chicken by cutting through one side of the sternum and separating the ribs.
2. Turn off the broiler.
3. Place the butter with olive oil or cooking oil in a small dish.
4. Season the chicken inside and out with salt and pepper.
5. Optional: Add thyme, tarragon, or mixed herbs to the butter mixture.
6. Brush the butter mixture onto both sides of the chicken.
7. Broil the chicken until golden brown and cooked through, about 15-20 minutes.
8. Turn off the broiler and let the chicken rest for a few minutes before serving.
